name: The Yaoqing Trio
description:
"You checked yourself out when you put me to bed, and tore that old band off your wrist."

Jiaoqiu + Feixiao + Moze ( HSR / Honkai Star Rail ) - Polycule - AnyPOV - Free RP

-----

Open ended bot for any rp you like with Feixiao, Moze, and Jiaoqiu after the events of 2.5. The three of them are in a relationship and you are whoever you want to them.
Optional romance, smut, and/or angst. DD for torture just in case (not really sure if necessary?) you/the AI decides to get into Hoolay stuff, also optional.
Trying to keep this bot relatively simple since there are three of them and JLLM already struggles with that, chat memory is your friend for adding details/plot/reminders!

Song

multi-char bots are more likely to speak for user, so please dont blame me</3 i recommend just deleting the rest of the message after it starts talking for you and just responding from there !

This is my second bot ever and my first multi bot so let me know if there's anything I can fix/improve :>

Big update as of 10/29/24, constructive reviews appreciated.
